---
title: ""
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="hero">
  <h1>ICEMAN</h1>
  <p class="lead">
    <strong>Instrument for the Credibility of Effect Modification Analyses</strong>
    in randomized controlled trials and meta-analyses &mdash; Version 1.0
  </p>
  <p style="margin-top:1rem;color:#555;font-size:0.95rem;">
    Schandelmaier S, Briel M, Varadhan R, Schmid CH, Devasenapathy N, Hayward RA,
    Gagnier JJ, Borenstein M, VanDerHeijden GJMG, Dahabreh IJ, Sun X, Sauerbrei W,
    Walsh M, Ioannidis JPA, Thabane L, Guyatt GH.
  </p>
  <div style="margin-top:1.5rem;display:flex;gap:0.75rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
    <a href="tool.qmd" class="btn btn-primary">Open assessment tool →</a>
    <a href="manual/index.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-secondary">Read the manual</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

## What is ICEMAN?

ICEMAN is a validated instrument for systematically assessing the **credibility of claimed effect modification** (subgroup effects) in randomized controlled trials and meta-analyses. It provides structured criteria and response options to help researchers, clinicians, and guideline developers evaluate whether an apparent subgroup effect is likely to be real or a chance (or biased) finding.

Effect modification claims are common but often unreliable. ICEMAN addresses this by rating each claim across key credibility dimensions, culminating in an overall credibility rating on a continuous scale from **very low** to **high**.

---

## Downloads

```{=html}
<div class="download-grid">
  <div class="download-card">
    <div class="icon">📄</div>
    <h5>ICEMAN form — RCTs</h5>
    <p>Assessment form for randomized controlled trials</p>
    <a href="ICEMAN RCT 1.1 (6).docx" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">Download DOCX</a>
  </div>
  <div class="download-card">
    <div class="icon">📄</div>
    <h5>ICEMAN form — Meta-analyses</h5>
    <p>Assessment form for systematic reviews and meta-analyses</p>
    <a href="ICEMAN MA 1.1 (8).docx" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary">Download DOCX</a>
  </div>
  <div class="download-card">
    <div class="icon">📘</div>
    <h5>Full manual</h5>
    <p>Complete ICEMAN manual with explanations, examples, and references</p>
    <a href="ICEMAN manual .pdf" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">Download PDF</a>
  </div>
  <div class="download-card">
    <div class="icon">📊</div>
    <h5>Reference list</h5>
    <p>BibTeX file with all 149 references cited in the manual</p>
    <a href="references.bib" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary">Download .bib</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## How to cite

```{=html}
<div class="cite-box">
  <strong>Cite ICEMAN as:</strong><br><br>
  Schandelmaier S, Briel M, Varadhan R, Schmid CH, Devasenapathy N, Hayward RA,
  Gagnier JJ, Borenstein M, VanDerHeijden GJMG, Dahabreh IJ, Sun X, Sauerbrei W,
  Walsh M, Ioannidis JPA, Thabane L, Guyatt GH.
  ICEMAN: a novel tool for assessing the credibility of effect modification analyses
  in randomized trials and systematic reviews.
  <em>CMAJ</em> 2020;192(32):E901–E906.
  <a href="https://doi.org/10.1503/cmaj.200077" target="_blank">https://doi.org/10.1503/cmaj.200077</a>
  <br><br>
  <button class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-secondary copy-btn"
    onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('Schandelmaier S, et al. ICEMAN: a novel tool for assessing the credibility of effect modification analyses in randomized trials and systematic reviews. CMAJ 2020;192(32):E901–E906. https://doi.org/10.1503/cmaj.200077'); this.textContent='Copied!'; setTimeout(()=>this.textContent='Copy',2000)">
    Copy citation
  </button>
</div>
```

---

## Site overview

| Page | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [Manual](manual/index.qmd) | Full searchable manual with all items, response options, and worked examples |
| [Assessment tool](tool.qmd) | Interactive forms for RCTs and meta-analyses with downloadable report |

---

## License and version

ICEMAN Version 1.0. This instrument is freely available for use in research and clinical guideline development. Please cite the original publication when using ICEMAN.
